name: AWP | CMYK
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted with a multicolored abstract design over a white base. I knew you'd return; I just didn't expect it to be so soon... – Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这款定制涂装在白色基底上采用了多色的抽象设计。 我知道你会回来的；我只是没想到会这么快……——军火商步兹
